comment: Drives the buildhost site deploy (.github/workflows/preview.yml assembles _site/ from this file via .github/scripts/assemble-pages.ts and publishes it to sites.pazer.build; nothing else decides what gets published). Each {from, to} entry copies a repo file or directory (recursive) to a site output path rooted at https://sites.pazer.build/scratch_ui/branch/master/ (or the matching pr-<n>/branch site). Components + tokens are published at the site ROOT — the pre-restructure layout external consumers embed, mirroring the js-snippets root-relative URL convention — and also under /components so the demo's relative ../components/ references resolve; src/index.html forwards the site root to the spec site under /demo/.
